title: Lower maxCwnd 512→128, maxRTO 2000→500ms, ssthresh=64 to prevent slow-start burst flooding ISP
Sort retransmit queue by PktNum (oldest first), add RTO to diagnostics
Tune UDP CC: raise minCwnd/maxCwnd, softer beta, longer recovery epoch, limit retransmit burst
Proper CUBIC ssthresh + lower maxCwnd to prevent UDP burst flooding
Revert CC to known-good version (initCwnd=128, beta=0.9, always-slow-start)
Replace fixed window with simple AIMD congestion control (always slow-start recovery)
Reduce fixed UDP window to 256 to match bandwidth-delay product and prevent burst flooding
Replace CUBIC congestion control with fixed window for UDP transport
description: Inner TCP handles CC; outer fixed window (1024) just provides ARQ reliability

title: Cap maxCwnd at 256 to prevent burst flooding, restore CUBIC with slow-start recovery at floor
Aggressive UDP congestion control: initCwnd 128, minCwnd 64, beta 0.9, always slow-start after loss
Fix cwnd stuck at minCwnd — reset to slow start when hitting the floor so cwnd can recover
Tune UDP congestion control for higher throughput (initCwnd 32, minCwnd 16, maxCwnd 2048, beta 0.8, recovery epoch 500ms)
Fix server crash by upgrading Docker builder to Go 1.26 (Go 1.25 spinbit mutex bug)
Fix server crash by downgrading to Go 1.24 (Go 1.25 spinbit mutex crash on Alpine)
Fix server crash on Alpine (Go 1.25 spinbit mutex incompatibility)
Only backoff RTO on fresh packet losses to prevent RTO spiral to 2000ms
Add recovery epoch to prevent cascading cwnd collapse from burst packet loss
Re-ACK on duplicate packets to prevent deadlock when ACK is lost in transit
Only signal cwnd loss on fresh packet loss, not re-retransmissions
description: Prevents cwnd from repeatedly crashing on same lost packet; maxRetransmits raised to 50 to prevent cumAck stall from dropped packets

title: Replace slot channel semaphore with AcquireSlot (inFlight < cwnd check under mutex)
description: Eliminates slot inflation/starvation race between OnAck and OnLoss

title: Drain excess cwnd slots on loss to prevent unthrottled send bursts
description: OnLoss now drains the slot channel to match cwnd - inFlight, preventing sender from bypassing congestion window

title: Fix SACK double-counting in ARQ causing upload collapse
description: AckCumulative now skips already-SACKed packets; RetransmitTick skips OnLoss on drop-only ticks

title: Retransmit with original PktNum to prevent cumAck stall and connection freeze
Fix download stall: reset CUBIC state at minimum cwnd to prevent burst-collapse cycle
Prevent cwnd death spiral on download (OnLoss at minimum cwnd preserves slow start)
Show device key prefix with copy button in admin panel
Benchmark: добавлен тест UDP+ARQ v1.23.11
UDP: fix seq collision in sendResult — use NextSeq to prevent data loss
UDP: create WriteCh before dial — prevent data loss during stream open
ARQ: restore NeedsImmediateAck in HandleData — was accidentally removed, critical for gap recovery
ARQ: revert to v1.23.3 congestion control + RTO, keep only safe fixes (OnDrop, no sendAck in HandleData)
ARQ: remove sendAck from recvLoop path — fix deadlock when UDP send buffer full
UDP: non-blocking WriteTo with deadline, proper session loop cleanup via done channel
ARQ: rewrite congestion control — replace channel semaphore with mutex+notify
ARQ: fix slot leak in congestion control — adjustSlots syncs channel after every cwnd/inFlight change
ARQ: fix cwnd death spiral — skip OnLoss at minimum cwnd to preserve slow start
ARQ: диагностические логи cwnd/inFlight/sendBuf каждые 2 секунды
UDP: fix stream open race condition with Dialing flag, clean up debug logs
ARQ: увеличен minRTO до 200ms, немедленный ACK каждые 2 пакета, initial RTO 200ms
UDP: deduplicate retransmitted stream open — prevent double-dial race
UDP: per-stream write channel — deliverFn больше не блокирует processLoop
UDP: detailed diagnostic logging for ACK flow debugging
Bump version to 1.23.3
ARQ: запись PktNum для stream open/close в ACK state — фикс блокировки UDP
UDP debug логи для диагностики проблем с подключением
Исправлено скачивание обновлений (GitHub двойной редирект)

description:

title: ARQ: лимит на количество стримов для защиты от memory exhaustion

description: Reliable UDP transport интегрирован в daemon и server

title: Changelog система в admin панели
RTT sampling, sender-side dup ACK, single OnLoss per tick in ARQ
description: Sample RTT using Karn's algorithm, track sender-side duplicate ACKs for fast retransmit, call OnLoss/Backoff once per retransmit tick, fix goroutine leak on session cleanup, remove dead fields.

Integrate ARQ Controller into UDP transport for reliable delivery with congestion control
ARQ Controller tying all components together
AckState: received packet tracking and ACK generation for ARQ layer

ARQ send buffer with retransmit tracking

CUBIC congestion control for UDP ARQ transport
Add Jacobson/Karels RTT estimator for UDP ARQ
ACK encode/decode with 256-bit SACK bitmap for UDP ARQ reliability layer

description: Added Test 5 with UDP/TLS transport comparison and full comparison table across all VPN solutions

title: UDP transport throughput
description: Buffered packet channel on server, 4MB UDP socket buffers on both sides, larger stream receive buffer on client

title: UDP stream data ordering
description: Process UDP packets synchronously to preserve write ordering for stream data, fixing connection resets caused by concurrent goroutine writes

title: UDP handshake: decrypt incoming packet and encrypt response
description: Server was parsing encrypted handshake data as plaintext, causing auth failures
